_publications._publicationTitle: Effect of Mind-Body Skills Training on Quality of Life for Geographically Diverse Adults With Neurofibromatosis: A Fully Remote Randomized Clinical Trial.

_contextSnippet: Of 371 individuals, 228 (mean [SD] age, 42.7 [14.5] years; 170 women [75%]; 84% White individuals) were eligible and randomized
details: Successfully used for data collection in a fully remote randomized clinical trial with 228 participants across geographically diverse locations
